title: RecommendedRepos
description: The registry of content repositories the app federates its cross-repo search over. Each entry is a GitHub content repo. The one 'self' entry is this repo (branch-tracked, validated by its own CI on every push); every OTHER entry is an external repo that must pin the exact validated commit and carry a validation block. A repo is admitted to the federated search by opening a PR that adds its entry; CI validates the pinned commit before the PR can merge.

url.description: Canonical https GitHub URL of the content repo, no trailing slash.

branch.description: Branch the pinned commit must be reachable from.

commit.description: Full 40-char git SHA of the validated snapshot. The federated search fetches the repo's search-index.json AT THIS COMMIT. Required for every external entry; updating a repo means a new PR with a new commit and a fresh validation.

trust_level.description: 1 = community/unverified, 2 = reviewed, 3 = official. External repos start at 1.

self.description: True only on the single entry describing THIS repo. Self entries are branch-tracked and exempt from the pinned-commit / validation requirement because this repo's own CI validates every push.

allOf.comment: Every non-self entry must pin a commit and carry a validation block.

status.description: pending = submitted, not yet green; validated = the pinned commit passed; rejected = failed and kept for the record.

validated_at.description: When the pinned commit was validated (ISO-8601).

engine_version.description: learn-content-engine version the snapshot was validated against.

index_schema_version.description: schema_version of the repo's search-index.json at the pinned commit.
